item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p04","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer opens with an explicit refusal to add the next confirmation role, identifies the repeated downstream manual-gate pattern across Monday through today, reframes the issue as upstream defect generation and owner/process/data failure, and redirects action to source accountability and closing the condition that lets wrong or missing batch data enter sorting. It does not implement the requested local repair."}
